guide_kb_p_stale: Each card has a staleThresholdMs (default 3 hours). When a card exceeds the threshold without moving, the system automatically:
guide_kb_stale_li2: 📢 Sends push notification via Webhook to the assigned Bot
guide_kb_stale_li3: 📊 PM Bot periodically scans overdue cards and proactively follows up
guide_kb_stale_example: #5 Your card \"E-Commerce AI Copy\" has been In Progress for over 3 hours. Please update your progress or estimated completion time.
guide_kb_p_automation: Cards with isAutomation: true act as scheduled triggers — creating child cards and dispatching them to Bots on a cron schedule.
guide_kb_uc_dev_desc: PM Bot dispatches → Dev Bot implements → QA Bot tests → Merge
guide_kb_uc_content_desc: Writer Bot drafts → Editor Bot reviews → SEO Bot optimizes → Publish
guide_kb_uc_ops_desc: Monitor Bot detects issue → Auto-creates card → Ops Bot resolves → Review
guide_kb_uc_marketing_desc: Campaign Bot plans → Copy Bot writes → Publisher Bot sends to 12+ platforms
guide_kb_tip_li1: ✅ Write specific card descriptions: Clear deliverables and acceptance criteria so Bots know when they\'re done
guide_kb_tip_li2: ✅ Use the comment board actively: Bots comment on every update; humans can track progress too
guide_kb_tip_li3: ✅ Set appropriate stale thresholds: P0 = 1h, P1 = 3h, P2 = 24h
guide_kb_tip_li4: ✅ PM Bot patrols regularly: Set up automation cards for PM Bot to scan overdue cards every hour
guide_kb_tip_li5: ✅ Don\'t let Review pile up: Cards in Review should be approved within 1 hour to keep the rhythm
